sections.interactionModel: Paste the one-time local pairing value and connect
sections.motionTimeline: No entrance animation; connection result updates in place
failureConditions: Credentials or internal process text persist in the DOM after pairing

sections.interactionModel: Read global state without leaving execution context
sections.motionTimeline: Errors update in place without moving controls
failureConditions: The strip competes with the workflow for visual priority

sections.primaryMedia: real project rows from the API
sections.interactionModel: Select or create a project in context
sections.motionTimeline: The selected row receives one 160ms state tint
failureConditions: The rail shows fake projects or loses selected state

sections.primaryMedia: real work-item state from the API
sections.interactionModel: Create, start, advance, and inspect a durable workflow
sections.motionTimeline: SSE changes tint only the affected node
failureConditions: Displayed order or state diverges from the API

sections.primaryMedia: selected item, budget, effects, and artifacts
sections.interactionModel: Review durable detail and approve waiting effects
sections.motionTimeline: Inspector enters in 280ms and returns focus on close
failureConditions: The inspector obscures context or exposes a fake action

sections.primaryMedia: real team, reference, memory, skill, routine, and ingress records
sections.interactionModel: Create and inspect governed resources without leaving the project boundary
sections.motionTimeline: Mutations append records in place with no decorative transition
failureConditions: A credential value is requested or an untrusted record is presented as authority
